summary: Iteration 16 Testing COMPLETED: Banner Image removal verified, Member Types CRUD working, Extended Membership fields implemented. Fixed backend to save new membership fields on member creation. Backend 17/17 tests passed. Frontend features verified.

fixed_issues.issue: New membership fields (membership_ranking, membership_status, active_date, expiration_date, membership_fee, member_type_id, corporate, application_reviewer, opportunities_development, opportunities_reviewer, project_development, project_reviewer, project_management, content_operator) were not being saved on member creation
fixed_issues.fix: Added all 14 new fields to the new_member dict in admin_create_member endpoint

console_warnings: HTML hydration warnings about span inside tbody/select/option - these are from Emergent's development tooling and don't affect production

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/member-types returns member types list
Backend: POST /api/admin/member-types creates a new member type
Backend: PUT /api/admin/member-types/:id updates a member type
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/member-types/:id deletes a member type
Backend: Seeded member types exist (Individual, Corporate, Institutional)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=home returns slides
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=news returns slides
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=gallery returns slides
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=reading-list returns slides
Backend: GET /api/admin/members returns members list
Backend: POST /api/admin/members creates member with all new fields
Backend: GET /api/public/nav-pages returns pages
Backend: GET /api/public/site-pages returns system + custom pages
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns all active slides
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero carousel
Frontend: News page loads without PageBanner (hero slides only)
Frontend: Gallery page loads without PageBanner
Frontend: Reading List page loads without PageBanner
Frontend: Dynamic page /kls loads with hero slides and content
Frontend: Admin login works with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Member Types' link
Frontend: Member Types Manager page loads at /admin/member-types
Frontend: Member Types table shows seeded types (Individual, Corporate, Institutional)
Frontend: Add Type button visible on Member Types page
Frontend: Members Manager Membership Info tab has all new fields
Frontend: Membership Ranking input present
Frontend: Membership Status (Free/Professional) radio present
Frontend: Active Date input present
Frontend: Expiration Date input present
Frontend: Membership Fee input present
Frontend: Member Type dropdown present
Frontend: Corporate (Yes/No) radio present
Frontend: Application Reviewer toggle present
Frontend: Opportunities Development toggle present
Frontend: Opportunities Reviewer toggle present
Frontend: Project Development toggle present
Frontend: Project Reviewer toggle present
Frontend: Project Management toggle present
Frontend: Content Operator toggle present
Frontend: Pages Manager form does NOT have Banner Image field (correctly removed)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (span inside tbody/select/option) - these are from Emergent's development tooling and don't affect production functionality
seed_data_creation: Seeded member types: Individual (order 1), Corporate (order 2), Institutional (order 3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified: (1) Banner Image field removed from PagesManager admin form - no banner_image field in page dialog. (2) PageBanner component NOT rendered on News, Gallery, ReadingList, or DynamicPage pages - hero carousel is now the sole visual header. (3) Member Types CRUD at /api/admin/member-types working with seeded types Individual, Corporate, Institutional. (4) MemberTypesManager at /admin/member-types with table listing types. (5) MembersManager Membership Info tab has all 14 new fields: membership_ranking, membership_status (Free/Professional radio), active_date, expiration_date, membership_fee, member_type_id dropdown (populated from member_types collection), corporate (Yes/No radio), application_reviewer, opportunities_development, opportunities_reviewer, project_development, project_reviewer, project_management, content_operator. (6) Backend fix applied: admin_create_member now saves all new membership fields.

banner_image_removal.news_page: PageBanner NOT rendered, hero slides shown
banner_image_removal.gallery_page: PageBanner NOT rendered, hero slides shown
banner_image_removal.dynamic_page: PageBanner NOT rendered, hero slides or title fallback

bug_fix_applied.issue: New membership fields not saved on member creation
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: admin_create_member endpoint in membership.py did not include the 14 new fields in the new_member dict
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added all new fields with proper defaults to the new_member dict
